extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL attacked on final gravel sector, dropped ALAPHILIPPE and BERNAL on last climb 500m out to win solo
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL's decisive move came on penultimate gravel sector, not final climb—early selection forced rivals into reactive mode.
Final 800m gravel sector shattered peloton despite brevity, proving short sterrato more tactically valuable than long gradual ones.
Three-man selection emerged from gravel chaos with VAN DER POEL, ALAPHILIPPE, BERNAL—larger gear from ALAPHILIPPE noted but insufficient.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: Multiple accelerations across gravel sectors before final climb showed superior power endurance combination unusual for cyclocross specialists
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Defended well through gravel but cracked when VAN DER POEL attacked on asphalt climb, suggesting pure power deficit
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: Stalked leaders effectively but lacked acceleration to counter, third place suggests strong day without winning kick
